content.text: {"title":"User views deployment logs","slug":"user-views-deployment-logs","intent":"A user needs to inspect runtime output while diagnosing deployments.","story":"The user runs the logs command.","expected_behavior":"The CLI displays recent log output for the selected service.","boundaries":"This story does not cover log retention policy.","auditable_claims":["The logs command is user-facing."],"evidence":{"tests":[],"surface":["cli: logs"],"docs":[]}}
